svg.title: ESXi configuration journey: install, accounts, DCUI/Host Client, services, NTP/DNS/routing, lockdown
svg.desc: Six numbered stations show the order of configuration steps for a fresh ESXi host. A single ESXi host icon at the top feeds into station 1 and is shaped by each station in turn.
svg.text: One host · six configuration moves · in this order

g.text: Each numbered station is a separate subtopic in the lesson with its own concept, before/after, analogy, quick check, ELI5/ELI10, real-world, flashcards, and quiz.
Learn them in order on a fresh host, or jump to the one you need to fix.
Output of all six: a host that is ready to be joined to vCenter (lesson 9).
